chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. D - 1758 of 2023. 1.For orders on CMA 7581/2023. 2.For orders on o/obj.at Flag.A. 3.For orders on CMA 7582/2023. 4.For Hearing of main case. - 12.12.2023. Mr. Abdul Rauf Abro Advocate for petitioner. - 1. Granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Granted. 4. The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution praying that the functionaries of the police department be directed to dispose of certain applications filed by the petitioner and to maintain law and order in the area where he is residing. However, a perusal of those applications reflects that the petitioner is thereby essentially seeking the registration of the FIR, for which an alternate remedy is available to him before the Justice of Peace under Section 22-A Cr.P.C. Under such circumstances, the petition is found to be misconceived and stands dismissed accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Akber.
